recommendation.summary: The en-masse harness works, but the current market-covered corpus and current feature families did not produce a candidate edge.
next_highest_leverage: Expand and clean historical odds coverage so candidate selection is less constrained by 40 model-eligible events.
Generate genuinely new pre-fight signal candidates from residual clusters instead of more variants of the same feature families.
Add a locked holdout/future slice workflow before considering any candidate promotion.

smoke_gate.reason: This epic added CLI/config/artifact work only; it did not add an HTTP endpoint or UI surface.
